purpose: Transparent decorative Logging Camp art for the reviewed Wood-site inspection card

projectAuthorization.scope: Warpkeep PR #62 preparation and its use of the background-cleaned derivative in the public Warpkeep GitHub repository, plus an eventual official warpkeep.com Pages runtime only after separately approved deployment. This is use authorization only, not merge or deployment approval.
notGranted: general third-party derivative or redistribution permission
Wood placement, renderer, server, browser-derived balance, reward, or entitlement authority

sourceInputs.role: high-resolution user-supplied edit source with baked checkerboard

backgroundCleanup.method: A local macOS Vision foreground-instance alpha matte was generated from the exact supplied RGB source. The shipped pixels come from that supplied illustration; no generated replacement scene or GLB-derived artwork is included.

postMatteNeutralSpillCleanup.predicate: nonzero alpha, RGB average >= 220, and RGB channel spread <= 20

backgroundCleanup.visualReview: Reviewed after compositing on dark and light matte fields; the transparent source corners and interior equipment gaps contain no baked checkerboard.

brightNeutralPartialAlphaAudit.predicate: 0 < alpha < 255, RGB average >= 220, and RGB channel spread <= 20

runtimeAsset.delivery: same-origin checked-in runtime asset; no external CDN

presentationBoundary.interaction: local decorative art only; empty alt text, aria-hidden, and pointer-inert

licence.policy: The exact project instruction authorizes this Warpkeep runtime use but does not establish a public relicensing grant. See ASSETS-LICENSE.md.
